products.name: One Piece Cushion Chopper 35cm
products.description:
One Piece Cushion, size approx.35cm. Official product by AbyStyle.

Doctor Tony Tony Chopper will be seeing you soon! In the meantime, enjoy the softness of this superb One Piece cushion by ABYstyle, featuring the doctor from the Straw Hat crew!

  • Material: 100% polyester long-haired velboa fabric + embroidery.
  • Dimensions: H. 35cm x L. 35cm. Thickness : around 8 cm

products.name: One Piece Replica Portgas D. Ace Hat 38cm
products.description:
One Piece Replica of Portgas D. Ace Hat, size approx.38x12x35cm. Official product by Abystyle.

The famous super rookie of the Spades Pirates, now Commander of the Second Fleet of Whitebeard's Crew, has made a name for himself on all seas! Become as flamboyant as Portgas D. Ace or Fire Fists Ace thanks to this magnificent One Piece Replica Hat by ABYstyle!

  • Adult size
  • A precise design very faithful to the character
  • Pearls around the hat
  • Rubber badges
  • Size: 38x12x35cm
  • 50% polyurethane. 50% Nylon.
  • Hand surface wash only

products.name: One Piece Card Game 3D2Y ST-14 Starter Deck Display *EN*
products.description:
One Piece Card Game 3D2Y ST-14 Starter Deck Display in English. Official product by Bandai.

A StarterDeck with a Post-Summit War Theme!

This deck showcases the Straw Hat Crew and their two years of individual training following the Summit War! In addition to members of the Straw Hat Crew, this deck introduces new Characters, such as Haredasand Heracles!

Build a BlackDeck That Controls Costs!

Packed with cards that perform best with high-cost allies!

Increase the cost of Characters on your field to unleash an imposing new tactic that will shake up gameplay in the ONE PIECE CARD GAME.

Everything You Need to Play, All in One Product!

Comes with 5 holographic cards! Leader cards are holo+texturedfoil! Newcomers can easily pick up the ONE PIECE CARD GAME with this product! Cards from this deck can also be combined with previously released cards to build a variety of decks!

  • Constructed Deck x1   (51 cards)
  • DON!! Cards x10
  • Playsheet x1

products.name: One Piece Stickers 2 Skulls of the Emperors 16x11cm
products.description:
One Piece Stickers. Official product by Abystyle.

A new wind is blowing through piracy... New emperors emerge! Luffy finally joins Shanks as Emperor of the Seas! As for Baggy, his new Cross Guild crew has earned him this feared status. Do you prefer the old generation with Whitebeard and Kaïdo or the new one with Luffy? Take your pick from these mini One Piece stickers by ABYstyle.

  • Each pack includes 2 boards of stickers to decorate your walls, computer, notebook,…
  • Dimensions of one board: 16cm x 11cm.

products.name: One Piece A5 Notebook "Wanted Luffy" 21cm
products.description:
One Piece notebook, size approx.21cm. Official product by AbyStyle.

Whether it's against the World Government in Enies Lobby, against the greatest soldiers of the Navy in Marineford or against an Emperor of the Seas on Wholecake Island, Luffy doesn't back down from any challenge! These exploits take him further and further, and his fame continues to grow. His 1,500,000,000 berry bonus is more than justified! Take the bounty of the future King of Pirates everywhere with you with this superb One Piece notebook by ABYstyle!

  • Hard cover (matte finish). Inside printing with a design at the bottom of the page
  • Case binding
  • Bookmark
  • Material: paper
  • 180 pages
  • Dimensions: H. 21.7cm x 15.5cm

products.name: One Piece POP! Animation Vinyl Figures Buggy the Clown 9 cm
products.description: From Funko's popular 'POP!' series comes this vinyl figure. Each figure stands approx. 9 cm tall and comes in a window box packaging. Please note: For this item, demand is expected to be higher than the available quantity, which may result in allocations or cancellations of quantities ordered.

products.name: One Piece Statue 1/6 Yamato Ikigai by Tsume 40cm
products.description:
One Piece Statue of Yamato in Ikigai collection, 1/6 scale size approx.40cm. Official product in limited edition of 2000 pieces by Tsume Art.

DETERMINATION

Yamato is deeply determined to follow in the footsteps of his hero, Oden Kozuki. This is manifested in his unwavering drive to achieve his aspirations, even in the face of adversity. The reference to Oden is also represented thanks to the Kozuki family logo on the base.

FREEDOM

Yamato pursues his own path with fierce will. He aspires to total freedom, seeking to free himself from the constraints imposed by others and to follow his own destiny. Ready to take to the sea with Luffy, he fights alongside him.

KANABÔ

Yamato uses his favorite weapon here, identical to that of his father. Its powerful attack, ready to split the air, leaves little hope to his adversaries!

products.description:
One Piece Pack Mug320ml + Acrylic + Postcards "Luffy". Official product by Abystyle.

You want to make a fan of One Piece happy? This ABYstyle pack is the best gift to offer! It contains:

  • 1 MUG for drinking tea or coffee with your favorite pirate crew. 320ml.
  • 1 ACRYL® ultra-stylized with Luffy, the future king of pirates. High quality printing on acrylic
  • 11 SET OF 5 POST CARDS featuring the Strawhat crew. Dimensions: 14.8 x 10.5cm.

products.name: One Piece Card Game Premium Card Collection -Live Action Edition- *EN*
products.description:
One Piece Card Game Premium Card Collection -Live Action Edition- in English. Official product by Bandai.

To commemorate the NETFLIX ONE PIECE starting here comes a Premium Card Collection featuring characters that appeared in it! The cards also feature illustrations of the live action characters for the first time!

*The cards in this product are alternate illustration versions of previously released or distributed cards.

products.name: One Piece Statue 1/7 Brook HQS Dioramax by Tsume 65cm
products.description:
One Piece statue of Brook in HQS Dioramax, 1/7 scale size approx.65cm. Official product in limited edition by Tsume Art.

- SKELETON -

Brook, musician and swordsman of the Straw Hat, is a living skeleton, brought back to life thanks to the Devil Fruit Yomi Yomi. He has a unique and distinct appearance from other One Piece characters, making him a visually striking element of the crew.

- SPIRIT -

This statue represents him during his epic fight against Big Mom's minions. He uses not only his sword but also his ability which allows him to separate his soul from his body to move quickly and surprise his opponents. This ability is represented here with a phosphorescent effect.

- SOUL KING -

Talented musician, Soul King Brook was a world star during the 2-year timeskip, before joining the crew heading for the New World. He also uses his instrument to create auditory illusions, disorienting his enemies and allowing surprise attacks.

He is represented here with an alternate bust

W: 61 CM D: 57 CM H: 65 CM

products.name: One Piece Statue 1/6 by Tsume Roronoa Zoro Wano Ikigai 28cm
products.description:
One Piece Resin statue of Roronoa Zoro Wano in Ikigai collection, measures approx. 28cm. Official product in limited edition by Tsume Art

« I’m going to be the world’s greatest swordsman! All I have left is my destiny! My name may be infamous...but it’s gonna shake the world!!! » - Zoro

One Piece Resin statue of Roronoa Zoro Wano in Ikigai collection, measures 28 x 36 x 17,5 cm ,officially licensed, by Tsume Art.

The first member to join the Straw Hat Pirates is also the first legendary character to inaugurate the new range of 1/6 resin statues: here is Roronoa Zoro- Wano Ikigai by Tsume !

Here we find the green-haired swordsman in an ultra-dynamic pose as he leans on a Japanese Tori to assault Basil Hawkins with fatal blows in Wano Country! Gaining momentum, he is about to cut him into pieces thanks to his Nitôryû, holding firmly his two katanas Kitetsu the Third and Shusui behind, whose sharp white, blue and black blades will soon be reddened...

Ultimate Edition :

1 IN 5 CHANCE TO GET ONE!

Do you like surprises? Enjoy an ultra collector one with the Ultimate Edition! A different version of the statue with one or more modifications compared to the initial Regular Edition and a print run that will not exceed 20% of the limited edition!

The Ultimate edition is a "surprise" so it is not possible to know in advance if the statue will have these potential modifications!

Here is the list of possible modifications for the ultimate editions:

  1. Mask: Character with his Mask
  2. Outfit: Different Outfit or part of the outfit worn by the character
  3. Additional Element: Additional Element added to the statue
  4. Transparency: Transparent resin part on the statue
  5. Power Up: Character surpassing himself, transcending his strengths and Power
  6. Posing: Different Posing when attacking
  7. Additional FX: Additional energy / attack / power Effect
  8. Damage: Wounds / scrapes / scars related to the character's fight
  9. Ground: Decor of the base showing differences
  10. Eyes: Different gaze
  11. Face Expression: Other Facial Expression / Emotion of the character
  12. Different FX: Different energy / attack / power Effect
  13. Additional Weapons: Additional Weapon(s) is definitively the best definition!

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

products.name: One Piece Statue Figuarts ZERO Extra Battle Kaido King Beast Battle 32cm (New)
products.description:
One Piece statue of Kaido in Figuarts ZERO range, size approx.32cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

Kaido nicknamed "Kaido of the Hundred Beasts" is the captain of the Hundred Beasts crew. He is also known as "The Most Powerful Creature in the World". He and his crew occupy Wao Country. He is a former apprentice of the Rocks Pirates. Kaido is an antagonist of the Pirate Alliance Saga, notably the Wano Arc.

He is an unusually tall and extremely muscular man. He wears a dark blue feather cloak draped over his shoulders, a kimono tied with a braided belt, below which hang various ribbons and two thick chains each attached to a separate piece of cloth on each side. In Hybrid form, it has its four horns more than its big horns, its beard on the chin has lengthened, its scales extend from its rings in points up to the neck while passing by the pectoreaux. He also has two sharp teeth on the upper part of his jaw

Kaido joins Figuarts ZERO's EXTRA BATTLE series! A huge size, translucent parts, a dynamic expression, and some metal parts combine to accentuate the drama! The stand features a "DON!" sound effect part, translating the powerful illustration of Kaido into glorious three dimensional life. That's the EXTRA BATTLE series!

Set Contents :

  • Main Body
  • Effect parts
  • Stand

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

products.name: One Piece Statue 1/6 by Tsume Oden Ikigai 44cm ULTIMATE VERSION
products.description:
One Piece statue of Oden in Ikigai collection, measures approx. 44cm. Official product in ultimate version limited at 1044 pieces by Tsume Art.

Inspired by the illustrations of Eiichiro Oda, Oden Ikigai By Tsume is pictured here as he prepares to attack Kaido in Wano Country!

As a true follower of two-saber combat, the colossal Daimyo has developed his own Nitoryu : the Oden Two-Sword Style. He rushes straight at his enemy by crossing his two legendary swords, Ame no Habakiri " the saber that can slice Heaven itself " with Enma " the saber that can cut through the depths of Hell ", draining all his Armament Haki. The leader of the Nine Red Scabbards owns the only weapon capable of injuring Kaido and shows no mercy. Resting on a few rocky clusters and reflecting on the black lacquered base, we find the symbolic bird of the Kozuki family, forever engraved in wood and memories.

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

This deck is made up entirely of new cards and centers on two beloved characters, Zoro and Sanji! It also features many popular and minor characters familiar to the two pirates!

Introducing a new green blue Leader card, “ Zoro x Sanji”! As the first hybrid Leader, this card opens the scope for new approaches to gameplay!

The green and blue cards featured in this pack have perfect synergy with the booster pack released in the same month! Combine both packs to broaden the range of available strategies!

  • Playsheet x1

products.name: One Piece Card Game OP06 Booster Display (24 Packs) Wings of the Captain *English*
products.description:

The OP-06 Booster Display centers around Mainstay Pirates Zoro and Sanji. It is highly synergistic with ST-12, and even offers several related characters not found in ST-12.

It includes a mix of new and old themes, including Germa 66 and Thriller Bark! It also features Moria, Perona, and other popular characters from throughout the series.

The SP cards in this pack feature designs that that are themed around characters’ daily lives!

Configuration :

  • 1 Display box includes 24 Booster Packs
  • 1 Booster Pack includes 12 cards
